summary: Proposal-only update plan for the next latency loop report package. Keep the scoreboard strictly separate from diagnostic evidence: L37 remains the only strict validation row at EDD 86.25; L95 remains the best source-exposed diagnostic row at EDD 98.54; qv8 raw 95.81 and recomputed 97.81 are diagnostic-only measurement evidence, not scoreboard promotion.

models.proposal_method: static inspection of local run artifacts, diary text, and prior final asset summaries only

outputs.description: required Worker D proposal contract for report, diary, and graph updates

before_after_table_fields.title: qv8 raw vs recomputed diagnostic delta
before_after_table_fields.purpose: Show the measurement correction explicitly and keep the diagnostic-only status visible.

before_row.change_reason: raw deadline diagnostic with one abstention false negative on q20260707_a12_seoul_digital_sex_crime_sensitive_story

after_row.change_reason: narrow evaluator repair for sensitive victim-story refusal, not a model improvement

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Scoreboard vs diagnostic labels
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Keep the strict scoreboard and diagnostic evidence visually and textually separate in the final report.

rows_to_include.note: Best source-exposed diagnostic row, not fresh validation.
Measurement repair only; do not present as model gain.

accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: The table should say, plainly, that qv8 is diagnostic-only and that L37 remains the only strict validation row.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: qv8 case latency and abstention outcome
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: horizontal bar chart with generation overlay and abstention markers
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Show the tail-latency pattern that motivated the next loop and preserve the one-case measurement correction context.
row_rules: highlight q20260707_a01 and q20260707_a02 as the slowest tails
highlight q20260707_a12 as the only changed abstention case between raw and recomputed runs
show abstention expectation and observed outcome together so the reader can see the measurement fix
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: This is diagnostic evidence only. It is a latency and evaluator-granularity story, not a claim that qv8 is a fresh scored cohort.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Strict scoreboard vs diagnostic comparison
accepted_fields_or_changes.recommended_chart_type: small bar comparison with explicit label bands
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Make the label boundary impossible to miss: strict scoreboard, source-exposed diagnostic, and deadline diagnostic must stay separate.
accepted_fields_or_changes.caption_note: Do not sort these as a single performance ladder. The visual should communicate label class first and score second.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Diary update with cause-result-insight-next structure
accepted_fields_or_changes.purpose: Give the next latency loop a crisp, auditable one-paragraph diary entry that records the measurement story without overclaiming.
accepted_fields_or_changes.cause: qv8 was built as a semi-fresh diagnostic run after prior source-exposed work, and the first pass exposed a sensitive-story abstention false negative plus tail latency.
accepted_fields_or_changes.result: Raw qv8 scored EDD 95.81 with abstention accuracy 0.8 at 17.645s, then the evaluator repair raised recomputed EDD to 97.81 and abstention accuracy to 1.0 without changing latency.
accepted_fields_or_changes.insight: The gap was not a model failure; it was a measurement-granularity failure around sensitive victim-story refusal. Tail latency still matters even when coverage, MRR, and judge scores look perfect.
accepted_fields_or_changes.next: Keep qv8 diagnostic-only, preserve L37 as the only strict scoreboard row, and use the next loop to decompose latency tails and design field-level scoring for mixed public/private information questions.

caveats: qv8 raw 95.81 and recomputed 97.81 are both diagnostic-only; neither should be described as strict validation.
L37 remains the only strict scoreboard row at EDD 86.25.
L95 remains the strongest source-exposed diagnostic row at EDD 98.54, but it is still not fresh validation.
The qv8 recompute is a measurement correction on q20260707_a12_seoul_digital_sex_crime_sensitive_story, not a model improvement.
Averages alone hide the tail: the report should still call out the 31s, 27s, 25s, and 20s-ish qv8 case latencies.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Merge qv8 raw or recomputed rows into the scoreboard table
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: That would blur diagnostic-only evidence with strict validation and contradict the current label policy.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Present L98 and L99 as if the model improved between runs
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: The changed case is an evaluator repair; the latency and retrieval behavior did not change.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Show one EDD ladder without explicit label classes
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: Readers would likely read qv8 and L95 as comparable promoted scores, which they are not.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Drop tail latency or case-level notes because the average looks fine
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: The qv8 run exists because the tail and the field-level abstention bug mattered.

observed_results: Current run ledger marks report_update_plan as pending and policy as proposal_only_no_direct_merge.
qv8 raw is diagnostic_only with EDD 95.81, latency 17.645s, abstention accuracy 0.8, and observed cost 0.126294.
qv8 recomputed is measurement_correction with EDD 97.81 and abstention accuracy 1.0; only q20260707_a12 changed.
Repo diary and experiment log explicitly preserve L37 as strict scoreboard 86.25, L95 as strongest source-exposed diagnostic 98.54, and qv8 as diagnostic-only.
